text.message: Yo pause if he isn't here
Took me a minute to realize you were here
Off topic : are you using the word minute in slang or actual minute ?
Depends on when we resumed I guess
Slang. If he doesn’t know when we resumed, he won’t be able to determine if it was only a minute
I'll try to refrain from griefing
Slang: minute a two syllable word. Minute in slang to refer to time lapse long ago.
Had you said “took me a while..” one syllable. But if minute is time long, why not the creators of slang use the word “it’s been time I figured he was gone”
One syllable = time . To replace all references to time
lol you off on a real tangent there
That’s what happens during colonist game . Ponder the secrets of the universe
I'm just worried with you on wood and wheat port soon
🤫 the pain will be over soon
Currently I have most points but blue is for sure winning this
Don’t be scared black . Use the knight 😈
If you have just take army
Well I'm clearly stuck here but looks like you or red have now
If only I would use the knight to remove this robber . Ohh why won’t blue remove the robber from himself 😭
Need to keep you from sneaking road
Even though it's still not safe
So if I take army I can say same thing ?
That's a lot harder to pass back
No one else would give me a resource .
I don’t think anyone still has brick
White is at 8 guys lol. Remember that
Yup. Make sure white get to 10 first . It’s racist to place on white
Grrr meanwhile I’m still waiting to do a tripple play 😖
No resource has 6 or more gone
